prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 660cc **4A30T** (turbocharged inline-4) internals with forged **JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs** (8.5:1 compression) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle 1.5 bar boost reliably. Pair with a **Tomei 264° camshaft** (intake/exhaust) for improved top-end flow while retaining low-end drivability.

Forced Induction: Swap the stock **MHI TD025** turbo for a **Garrett GT1544V** (ball-bearing, .44 A/R turbine housing) with a **custom 3-inch stainless downpipe** (fabricated by **HKS** for the Pajero Mini’s tight engine bay). Use a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 40% larger than OEM) and **SARD fuel rail** with **ID1000x injectors** to support 220+ hp at 1.3 bar.

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** in the **5-speed F5M42** transmission (OEM gear ratios retained) and pair with a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** (multi-disc, 6-puck) and **PPG lightweight flywheel** (4.5kg). Upgrade the **R134a A/C system** with a **Sanden SD7H15 compressor** to prevent belt slippage under load.
estetica: Body: **Liberty Walk LB Works Pajero Mini VR-II widebody kit** (FRP construction, +80mm front/+100mm rear fenders) with **custom carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **Seibon carbon fiber rear gate** (OEM-style spoiler delete). Paint: **PPG Concept Series ‘Deep Impact Blue’** with **3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap**.

Wheels: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami 15x7 +25** (5x114.3, 45mm offset) with **Yokohama Advan A052 195/50R15** tires (stretched fitment). Brake calipers: **Project Mu B-Spec 4-piston front** (256mm rotors) and **2-piston rear** (220mm rotors), powder-coated **Gloss Gunmetal**.

Interior: **Bride Zeta III** (fixed-back, Kevlar/carbon shell) with **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses** (Mitsubishi-specific mounting brackets). Dash: **Defi BF Advance gauges** (boost, oil temp, wideband AFR) in a **custom carbon fiber gauge pod**. Steering: **NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel** with **Momo quick-release hub** (Pajero Mini-specific spline adapter).
